tasks.step: T2.0: Create shared gbrain helpers

tasks.step: T2.3: Tests for brain query/write tools
tasks.notes: 11 tests: happy paths, gbrain disabled, member not found, gbrain unavailable — all passing

tasks.step: VERIFY: Phase 2 — Brain query/write tools

tasks.step: VERIFY: Phase 3 — Code analysis tools
tasks.notes: APPROVED by fleet-reviewer. Minor note: code_callers missing not-found test (non-blocking).
